segments.text: Truly my soul finds rest in God; my salvation comes from him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Truly he is my rock and my salvation; he is my fortress, I will never be shaken.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How long will you assault me? Would all of you throw me down— this leaning wall, this tottering fence?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Surely they intend to topple me from my lofty place; they take delight in lies. With their mouths they bless, but in their hearts they curse.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Yes, my soul, find rest in God; my hope comes from him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Truly he is my rock and my salvation; he is my fortress, I will not be shaken.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My salvation and my honor depend on God; he is my mighty rock, my refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Trust in him at all times, you people; pour out your hearts to him, for God is our refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Surely the lowborn are but a breath, the highborn are but a lie. If weighed on a balance, they are nothing; together they are only a breath.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not trust in extortion or put vain hope in stolen goods; though your riches increase, do not set your heart on them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: One thing God has spoken, two things I have heard:
and with you, Lord, is unfailing love; You reward everyone according to what they have done.
segments.speaker: God
